sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109471" key="u(po/faidros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπόφαιδρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109471.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">somewhat cheerful</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gay,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:143" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.143</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
